# LCJS Reference Implementations - AI Documentation

This project contains high-performance chart integration examples for multiple frameworks.

## Module Index

- [Backend (Node.js & SQLite)](/backend.txt) - Implementation details for backend
- [Shared Logic & Mock Data](/shared.txt) - Implementation details for shared
- [React Frontend](/react.txt) - Implementation details for react
- [Vue Frontend](/vue.txt) - Implementation details for vue
- [Angular Frontend](/angular.txt) - Implementation details for angular
- [Svelte Frontend](/svelte.txt) - Implementation details for svelte
- [Vanilla JS Frontend](/vanillajs.txt) - Implementation details for vanillajs
- [App Viewer (Main UI)](/viewer.txt) - Implementation details for viewer

## Full Context
- [Combined Source Code](/full.txt) - Everything in one file (use if you lack browsing capabilities)
